user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] Scheduled Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected initiated for Pacific Northwest Outfitters.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Andrew Taylor <andrew.taylor@pacificnorth.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-15 08:33 EST
Subject: consumption trend - Action Required

There's been a change in our timeline for consumption trend. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
To: Andrew Taylor <andrew.taylor@pacificnorth.com>
Date: 2024-01-20 11:25 EST
Subject: consumption trend - Action Required

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with consumption trend. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

Meeting: consumption trend Discussion - Pacific Northwest Outfitters
Date: 2024-03-02
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Andrew Taylor (Pacific Northwest Outfitters), Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft), Kevin (Pacific Northwest Outfitters)

[00:02:00] Andrew Taylor (Pacific Northwest Outfitters): Good morning. I wanted to follow up on consumption trend from our last session.

[00:08:00] Kevin (Pacific Northwest Outfitters): Let me add some context -- we've been working on budget approval and found that the current vendor contract has a 90-day exit clause we need to plan around.

[00:11:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is integration complexity.

[00:16:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): The timeline for resource allocation is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:20:00] Andrew Taylor (Pacific Northwest Outfitters): The timeline for resource allocation is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:22:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): The timeline for timeline constraints is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.
